'''Nigel III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] that had an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] presence in the form of a base. [[Officer/Legends|Officer]] [[Lynx Reglis]] was stationed there.

==Description==
Nigel III was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Nigel system/Legends|Nigel system]] of the [[Kira sector/Legends|Kira sector]], part of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="TEAOC" /> It had [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] and dry areas.<ref name="SSp" />

==History==
During the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] maintained a military presence on Nigel III. The government of Nigel III monitored inbound and outbound [[Starship/Legends|starship]] traffic through its port authority, and the [[Bureau of Ships and Services/Legends|Bureau of Ships and Services]] had an office on the world. Imperial [[Officer/Legends|officer]] [[Lynx Reglis]] was stationed on the planet's Imperial base, where she in her spare time enjoyed several recreational activities, including ocean cruises and nature hikes. The [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Duan Zorn]] found himself under arrest by Nigel III authorities after failing to pay port fees and stealing the [[Kazellis-class light freighter]] ''[[Longrunner]]''.<ref name="SSp" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nigel III was introduced in ''[[Stock Ships]]'', a [[1997]] supplement to the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[West End Games]].
